description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The post is a block of black text on white discussing Israel, Iran, opinions about news media and polls, the 2020 election, Venezuela, and possible regime change in Iran, signed 'President DJT'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Israel never talked me into the war with Iran; IRAN CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON
